optionalFeatures.description: Optional features for the Hono framework: ai, agents, payments, email, realtime, cron, vector, observability

targetDir.description: Absolute path to the generated project root. Required when running from forge CLI.

projectName.description: Project name (matches the root package.json `name` field). When provided, this is used directly for derived values like the Python package name and DB filename, instead of re-reading from disk. Recommended when invoked from the forge CLI.
